title: urceola polymorpha
intro: Urceola polymorpha, also known as the Starfish Flower or Urceola, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Urceola polymorpha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. Urceola polymorpha can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
